sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n1970" key="a)qe/thtos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀθέτ-ητος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n1970.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">cancelled</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἡμισφαίριον</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2043.tlg001:2:11" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heph.Astr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.11</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
